title: Viners Barware Silver Stainless Steel Single Wall Ice Bucket, 1 Litre
availability_text: Only 6 left in stock (more on the way).
features: CLASSIC BARWARE | Our small ice bucket is an indispensable barware tool for any entertainer or home. Keep your ice cold and contained in this stylish ice container, ready to serve drinks on any occasion.

SIZE | This Viners Ice Bucket has a 1 litre capacity and is suitable for small bottles, moving easily to your table to refresh drinks, or storing fresh-cut fruit. The single-wall bucket comes with two carry handles.
BRUSHED SILVER | Made from fine quality stainless steel, our ice bucket is strong with a brushed finish that won't scuff easily or tarnish. This item is hand wash only. Do not use abrasive sponges.

BARWARE RANGE | Entertain, create and serve with flair and quality thanks to the Viners Barware Collection. Our range has all the tools to professionally entertain guests at home, from cocktail shakers to stirrers and bottle openers

VINERS ELEGANCE | Viners has existed for over 110 years and has become a much-loved British brand and household name, steeped in heritage. We pride ourselves on delivering excellence - elegant, robust barware made from the finest materials

Keep wine chilled for longer with this double wall insulated stainless steel cooler. Finished with a satin brush effect on the exterior and polished mirror on the interior. Keep wine chilled for longer with this double wall insulated stainless steel cooler. Finished with a satin brush effect on the exterior and polished mirror on the interior. This classic shape cocktail shaker with a brushed gold steel finish features an airtight lid with integral strainer. Perfect for preparing creative cocktails at home. This silicone ice mould will create 4 (4.5cm/ 13/4”) perfectly sphere shapes. Large pieces of ice melt slower, allowing your drinks to stay cooler without diluting.
